auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your properties
auth.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

properties.title: Properties
properties.subtitle: Manage your buildings and units
properties.emptyDescription: Get started by adding your first property.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Track rent payments and follow up on late payments
payments.emptyDescription: Payments will appear here once leases are active.
payments.ignoreDescription: This payment will be excluded from rent tracking and automated reminders. You can restore it at any time.
payments.waiveCharges: Waive all charges during this period
payments.deductionReasonPlaceholder: e.g. agreed rent reduction, defect compensation...

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: Manage your tenants and their information
tenants.emptyDescription: Add your first tenant to get started.

leases.title: Leases
leases.subtitle: Manage rental contracts and agreements
leases.emptyDescription: Create your first lease to start tracking payments.

indexation.title: Rent Indexation
indexation.subtitle: Automatic rent adjustments based on the health index
indexation.epcWarningDescription: Brussels and Flanders have EPC-based restrictions on rent indexation. Properties with a poor energy label may have limited or no indexation allowed.
indexation.emptyDescription: Indexation calculations will appear here when leases have anniversary dates approaching.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your payment follow-up and preferences
settings.automatedFollowUpDescription: Automatically check for overdue payments 3 times per day (00:00, 10:00, 17:00) and send escalating reminders.
settings.escalationDescription: Configure when each reminder level is triggered after the payment due date.
settings.finalNoticeDescription: Includes a PDF overview with payment details and interest charges.
settings.chargeInterestDescription: Interest will be calculated and shown in the final notice PDF.
settings.subject: Subject
settings.landlordReportDescription: Receive automatic email reports summarising the payment status of all your tenants.
settings.reportScheduleDescription: Choose which days of the month you want to receive a payment overview report.
settings.skipIfAllPaid: Skip report if all payments are received
settings.skipIfAllPaidDescription: Do not send a report email when every tenant has paid on time. You will only be notified when there are outstanding or overdue payments.
